name: PargolfStudios
about: Par Golf Studios is a professional training facility offering lessons and simulator access for golfers of all skill sets. The venue operates as an indoor facility with a focus on tailored training experiences, providing personalized guidance from expert instructors. Membership plans are available for convenient walk-in sessions, and an initial complimentary facility tour is required before booking specific training packages.
why_golfers_like_it: Proprietary Trackman technology that retains user data for their entire golf career
Flexible membership plans that cater to individual needs
Complimentary 30-minute facility tour to get started

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site.
No mention of alcohol service available on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Utilized through a proprietary technology partnership

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but as a training facility, it is recommended that you bring your own clubs for the best personalized experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services on-site, so outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes of virtual golf?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for completing 18 holes of virtual golf.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website mentions being for golfers of all skill sets but does not specifically state if it is kid-friendly or offers junior programs.
